chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-30 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Applicant: Ghulam Qadir s/o Mir Gul Through Mr.Abdul Rasheed Abro, Advocate Respondent: The State, Through Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G Date of hearing: 10.12.2025 Date of decision: 10.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: Pursuant to the order passed by this Court on 19.09.2025, a detailed report dated 26.09.2025 of vehicle bearing registration No. KT‐8334 (previous registration No. GP‐3267), after correction of record in the database of the Motor Registration Wing, Karachi, has been submitted. The report confirms that the ownership of the vehicle in question stands in the name of Ghulam Qadir, who has moved the present revision application impugning the order dated 27.03.2025. The impugned order dated 27.03.2025, passed in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.10/2025 by the learned II‐Additional Sessions Judge, Tando Allahyar, dismissed the applicants prayer for superdari as there was a discrepancy in the engine numbers. Thus, the application for restoration of custody of the vehicle in question was declined, as not sustainable. Since then the engine and chassis numbers now stand corrected pursuant to the report dated 26.09.2025, accordingly the impugned order is set-aside and the revision application is allowed. The vehicle in question shall be released to the applicant in accordance with law, after proper identification and verification provided it is not involved in any other crime. Office is directed to transmit the copy of this order to the concerned S.H.O for compliance.

The vehicle in question shall be released to the applicant in accordance with law, after proper identification and verification provided it is not involved in any other crime. Office is directed to transmit the copy of this order to the concerned S.H.O for compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
